{{Infobox group
| name = Shepherd (The Elder Empire: Shadow)
| introduced = ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea
}}

''See also: [[Shepherd (The Elder Empire: Shadow) Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shepherds]] are members of the [[Consultant]] [[Guild]] within the [[Elder Empire]], characterized by their black attire and masks. They serve as specialized agents focused on reconnaissance, observation, and infiltration rather than direct combat or assassination. Their rigorous training involves physical feats such as scaling towers and navigating sewers, alongside mental disciplines like memory training to ensure they can provide highly accurate intelligence. While they act as the eyes and ears of the Empire, assisting with tasks ranging from cleaning up scenes to providing information for their leaders, they are noted for being skittish and risk-averse in combat situations. The group is led by a High Shepherd, [[Tyril]], and functions as part of the broader [[Consultant]] network dedicated to serving the Empire.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shepherds]] wear black.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c1">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|A Shepherd is a type of entity or person.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c8">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The team includes thirty-three [[Shepherds]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c10">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shepherds]] engage in combat on ledges.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c11">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Shepherds]] are trained in concealment.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c4">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|A Shepherd was killed by a girl in a [[Blackwatch coat]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c21">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Shepherds]] serve as a group of guards and lookouts, with one member even participating in an attempt to lunge for [[Shera]]'s ball. During the events of this volume, a Shepherd was discovered crumpled in black against a wall. As the group's presence became more established, a third individual was identified as belonging to their ranks. In subsequent encounters, a Shepherd provided [[Shera]] with a captain's horn and also lent her a gun.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|A Shepherd was found crumpled in black on the wall.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c8">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shepherds]] act as lookouts and guards.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c15">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|A third person was identified as a Shepherd.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shepherds]] are a group that includes one of the people who lunged for [[Shera]]'s ball.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c17">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|A Shepherd handed [[Shera]] a captain’s horn.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c25">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] borrowed a gun from a Shepherd.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c26">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 26</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|“The full team,” Meia explained, “consists of thirty-three Shepherds, fourteen combat-trained Masons, a dozen sailor Masons to crew the ship, and us.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c10" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire groups]]
